name: Kaiser Glider - Golden Burst
name_jp: カイザー・グライダー－ゴールデン・バースト
desc: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Kaiser Glider - Golden Burst"<!--sic--> once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; this card's ATK becomes that monster's current ATK until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Kaiser Glider - Golden Burst"<!--sic--> once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; this card's ATK becomes that monster's current ATK until the end of this turn.
eff: (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Kaiser Glider - Golden Burst"<!--sic--> once per turn. summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
